name: Synup Social vs. CoSchedule
hero_summary: Ready for an upgrade? Time to discover Synup Social. Lovers of CoSchedule will love Synup Social. CoSchedule provides the basics, getting the job done for teams who need scheduling and automation help. But you deserve more. If you love the ease and the straightforward approach of CoSchedule, you’ll love Synup Social’s intuitive, data-backed solution to social media management. With expanded capabilities to create data-informed posts based on trends or past performance, Synup Social is the obvious choice!
counter_text_1: say they can effortlessly collaborate with their teams
counter_text_2: of users say they’ve cut their social media management time in half
counter_text_3: average growth in engagement in the first 6 months
section_2_heading: Upgrade your platform; level up your presence
section_2_summary: CoSchedule is meant for small teams, but is it holding back your growth? While its platform is beloved by lean and mean social media squads, CoSchedule’s pricing makes it hard to get the best bang for your buck. While they’re nickeling and diming you, Synup Social helps you do more with less. Here’s why you should make the switch:
section_2_slider_1_heading: Discover what makes your audience tick
section_2_slider_1_summary: Data-driven social media strategies get results. While CoSchedule’s analytics are lacking, Synup’s post-by-post analysis will help you understand which of your posts are evergreen. Don’t just view your metrics at-a-glance; understand the nitty-gritty details of your audience engagement.
section_2_slider_2_summary: CoSchedule’s campaign templates are helpful, but a template can only get you so far. Synup Social is a post recycling machine, helping you revive your best posts, explore industry trends, copy your competitors, and more. Plus, our AI-powered post creator means your first draft is already done. Get ready to smash your engagement goals!
section_2_slider_3_heading: Collaboration is the name of the game
section_2_step_3_summary: Tired of getting your wires crossed? Time for a change. Synup Social aligns your team, no matter its size. Whether you’re approving posts, collaborating on content, or showing clients their completed post calendar, we make it easy to manage your team (or avoid micromanaging from your boss).
section_2_slider_4_summary: While CoSchedule provides rudimentary support for agencies, Synup Social is build with agencies in mind. With Synup Social, you can schedule multi-location or multi-brand posts simultaneously - without having to log in to multiple accounts. And with smart white labeled solutions, you can take all the credit yourself.
section_4_why_choose_synup_subtitle: PURPOSE BUILT TO PRODUCE RESULTS FOR ALL BUSINESS SIZES
section_4_why_choose_synup_heading: Why you should choose Synup Social over CoSchedule?
why_choose_tab_desc_1: We Post For Every Social Platform
why_choose_tab_desc_2: We Help You Generate Ideas & Boost Posts
why_choose_content_summary: Boost your brand presence on social media with our AI-powered platform. Create, publish, and track engagement of your posts all in one place, and go live in just minutes. Results guaranteed 🚀.
testimonial_summary: Social media management teams love Synup Social for its robust analytics, content inspiration, ease of post creation, and streamlined interface. Teams that make the switch to Synup Social benefit from an enhanced collaboration workflow, spending less time creating and editing content and more time engaging with their audience!
customer_review_1_name: Bree M - Director Of Marketing And Community Relations
customer_review_1_summary: I can use their services as a platform to make sure all my business locations are up to date with all the correct information. I don't have to go to all these other sites to change hours when we have a holiday!
customer_review_2_name: Elisa Rose L - Vice President & Founding Member
customer_review_2_summary: Synup is very user friendly and very effective at claiming and updating directory listings for businesses. Reviews requests are also easy to send out and respond to right from the same dashboard.
section_3_summary: CoSchedule is renowned as a solid tool for small teams. It’s a lean, agile platform that provides all you need in a social media management tool. But what if, for the same price, you could add essential features like trend research, post inspiration, advanced analytics, and more? That sounds like a no-brainer to us. See for yourself:

seo.title: CoSchedule Alternative - Compare Features & Pricing
seo.description: Tired of CoSchedule? See what's out there and learn about the #1 CoSchedule alternative.
